description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a long, ribbed handguard extending nearly the full length of the barrel, which is capped with a small muzzle device. The rifle features a prominent pistol grip and a collapsible or adjustable stock with an open triangular design, typical of AR-platform rifles. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, inserted just ahead of the trigger guard. The upper receiver appears to have a flat top, likely for mounting optics, but no sighting system is visible. The overall silhouette is sleek and angular, with a matte, non-reflective finish. The construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, common in contemporary urban firearms.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a long ribbed handguard, collapsible stock, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte black.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, ribbed handguard, and barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view showing the narrow barrel and handguard, with the muzzle device visible at the tip.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 0, with all major features like the stock, grip, handguard, and magazine visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock's open triangular design and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
